tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
id && ls -ld //usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons /usr/src/appp /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null && stat -c '%AA %U %G %n' /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons  /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged 2>/dev/null
uid=0(root) gid=0(root) groups=0(root)
drwxr-xr-x 11 root root 4096 Dec 24 09:03 /usr/share/icons
drwxr-xr-x  1 root root 4096 Dec 24 09:03 /usr/share/pixmaps
drwxr-xr-x  1 root root 4096 Mar 17 09:05 /usr/src/app
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"chmod 700 /usr/src/app && chmod 700 /usr/src/app/staged && chmod 700 /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons && find /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons -type f -name '*.png' -exec chmod 600 {} + && find /usr/src/app -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.tar.gz' -exec chmod 600 {} + && stat -c '%A %U %G %n' /usr/src/app /usr/src/app/staged /usr/share/pixmaps /usr/share/icons | cat"}
